name: Independence Day Flag Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: www.hersheys.com
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine butter, sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Beat on high speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes.
3. Stir together flour, cocoa, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Add alternately with water to the butter mixture. Blend just until combined. Pour into prepared pan.
4. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan. Cool completely on a wire rack. Place cake on an oblong serving tray or foil-covered cardboard.
5. Prepare vanilla buttercream frosting and frost the cake. Arrange blueberries in the upper left corner of the cake to create a 4x5-inch rectangle. Arrange strawberries in rows for the red stripes. Serve about 12 to 15 servings.
